libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image, environment variable, or system property setup appears necessary. Tests should exercise the scalars entirely in-process, for example by coercing ExtendedScalars values directly and registering them in a graphql-java schema/runtime wiring.

deterministic_setup.reason: The resolved graphql-java-extended-scalars 2021-06-29T01-19-32-8e19827 POM and Gradle module metadata declare graphql-java 0.0.0-2021-06-27T12-22-33-cd2bab76 as its compile/API dependency; the same-version graphql-java artifact is absent and causes dependency resolution failure.

libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: graphql-java-extended-scalars is an in-memory scalar library, but this timestamped artifact is built against a different timestamped graphql-java artifact; meaningful GraphQL wiring coverage should use that resolved companion version rather than graphql-java at the extended-scalars version, which is not published.
